untranslatable_reason: The signal requires arithmetic operations (price - SMA > threshold) that cannot be expressed with allowed operators. The ALLOWED_OPERATORS list does not include subtraction, addition, or distance calculations. A mean reversion threshold relative to SMA requires custom indicator computation not available in the operator set.
translation_notes: Signal is mathematically unexpressible with available operators. The core logic (deviation distance from SMA) requires subtraction/difference operators which are not in the allowed set. Attempted to approximate using directional crosses but this loses the threshold magnitude requirement. Recommend adding 'sma_deviation' or similar pre-computed indicator, or extending operators to include arithmetic.
